titleStmt.title: SII 33.169: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 169. (A.R. No. B 274 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab near the Pālakola by the side of the Gaṇēśa image on the hill, opposite the Surabhēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1181, Kāḷayukta, Kārttika ba. 1, Tuesday, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1258 A.D. November 1, Tuesday, Lunar eclipse occurred previous day.

Records a gift of land made by Mahāpradhāni and Sarvādhikāri Anantadēva to the god Muktēśvara for the merit of the king. It also records another gift of 5 ga of land by Paḍihāri Baḷiyappa-Nahiḍu (Nāyuḍu) for the burning of lamp and bells for the same deity. Further it states that Mahādēvarāśi, the son of Iśānarāśi was placed incharge of the endowments. It contains very interesting imprecatory portion that whoever destroys this charity would commit the sin of falling into Kumbhipākam (ethereal hell or infernal hell).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu vri
krama kālaṁbuna saka
varuṣaṁbulu 1181
nēṁṭi kāḷayuku
ta saṁvatsara kā¨rttika ba 1
ma sōmagrahaṇamu
nāṁḍu svasti samasta prasa
sti sahitaṁ śrī manu
mahāpradhāni sa¨rvvādhikā
ri Anaṁtadēvaṁḍu svasti śrī
matu gaṁḍaṁpeṁḍāra jaṁ
nigadēva mahārājula
ku buṁṇyaṁgānu mu
kutēśvara dēvaraku tā
ḷigiṁpanu sāśvata vri
ttigānu varisēnu kha 10
rā ceṟlanu nīru nēla pā
dikānu Iccenu Āyana
baṁṭu paḍihāri

baḷiyaḍi(ppa)nā
hiḍu mutkēśvadē
varaku dīpā¨rtti gha
ḍi gaṁṭa je gaṁṭaku gu
ḍi gaṭā Iccenu ga 5
Iśānarāsi koḍu
ku mahādēva
rāsi vritti pā
liṁci dīniki Evva
jalainānu Upē
kṣiṁcirēni kuṁ
bhipātra(ka)muna pa
ḍuvāru maṁga
ḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
